auth.name: Name

auth.termsAgreement: By creating an account, you agree to our
auth.confirmationSent: We've sent you a confirmation link to verify your email address.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email address already exists. Please log in instead.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

auth.completeProfileDesc: Just a few more details to get you started.
auth.usernameInvalidChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
auth.fetchProfileError: Could not fetch your profile. Please try logging in again.
auth.createProfileError: Failed to create your profile. Please try logging in again.
auth.updatePasswordDesc: Enter a new password for your account below.
auth.passwordUpdated: Your password has been successfully updated! You will be redirected to the login page.
auth.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

errors.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores (no spaces or special characters).
errors.usernameTaken: This username is already taken. Please choose another one.
errors.usernameCheckFailed: Could not verify username. Please try again.

post.promotionDescription: Your post is now being promoted.

profile.challengePointsDesc: Points earned from accepted challenge submissions. Rank up on the leaderboard!

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.pageDescription: Customize how the application looks and feels.
appearance.chatDescription: Preview and customize your chat experience.

language.title: Language
language.pageDescription: Choose your preferred language. The app will automatically adjust text direction for right-to-left languages.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control who can see your content
privacy.pageDescription: Manage your account privacy and blocked users.
privacy.privateDescription: Only people you approve can see your photos and videos. Your existing followers won't be affected.

security.title: Security
security.pageDescription: Manage your account security settings and active sessions.
security.passwordDescription: Update your password regularly to stay secure.
security.phoneDisabled: Phone number features are currently disabled.
security.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.loginAlertsDescription: Get notified about new sign-ins to your account.
security.signOutAllDescription: This will sign you out from all devices including this one.
security.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
security.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account, posts, messages, and all associated data from our servers.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.unavailable: The ability to promote posts is currently unavailable.
promotions.comingSoonMessage: The ability to boost your posts to a wider audience is coming soon. Stay tuned!
promotions.totalImpressionsDescription: Total views on your promoted posts.
promotions.managePromotions: Manage your boosted posts and view their performance.
promotions.promoteDescription: Boost your content to reach a wider audience.
promotions.noMorePosts: You have no more posts to promote.

chat.noConversationsDesc: Start a conversation with your friends or create a group to get started!
chat.noCallsDesc: Start a voice or video call from any chat.
chat.noGroupsDesc: Create or join a group to chat with multiple people.

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.noBookmarksDesc: Save posts to see them here.
bookmarks.noCollectionsDesc: Create a collection to organize your bookmarks.
bookmarks.organizeDesc: Organize your saved posts into collections.
bookmarks.name: Name
bookmarks.privateOnly: Only you can see this collection
bookmarks.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this collection?

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Compete and grow together
challenges.searchPlaceholder: Search challenges by title, category, or tag...

create.getVerifiedEmojis: Get Verified to unlock Official Emojis

story.liveDescription: Your story is now live for 24 hours.

dialogs.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your {{itemType}}.
dialogs.reportDescription: Why are you reporting this post?

media.tooManyFilesDescription: You can only upload up to {{max}} media items.
media.invalidFileTypeDescription: {{filename}} is not a supported image or video file.

account.deletionContact: Please contact madanmohandas@krishnaconnect.in to complete account deletion.

calls.title: Calls
calls.noCallsDesc: Start a voice or video call from any chat.

events.title: Events
events.checkBackLater: Check back later for new events.

getVerified.title: Get Verified
getVerified.applicationReceivedDesc: Thank you for applying! We will review your application and contact you shortly to schedule your KCS Meet.
getVerified.heroDesc: Join the verified community of devotees. Unlock exclusive features and establish your authentic presence.
getVerified.applicationExistsDesc: You already have a verification request.
getVerified.resubmittedDesc: Your updated links are now under review.

lists.title: Your Lists
lists.description: Create and manage custom lists of users to see a curated timeline of posts from only those accounts.
lists.noLists: You haven't created any lists yet.

nft.description: Showcase your unique NFTs on your profile.
nft.connectWalletDesc: Connect your wallet to view and display your digital collectibles.

starred.title: Starred Messages
starred.noStarredDesc: You can star important messages to keep track of them here.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your performance and growth
